home.contactSubline: Tell us about your vision and we'll get in touch.

about.title: About
about.story:
DarSaif is an architecture office based in Buraydah, Qassim, Saudi Arabia. We work across residential, commercial, urban, and planning projects — bringing rigour and intent to every brief, regardless of scale.

Our work is grounded in the specific: the site, the client, the climate, the culture. We do not impose a signature style. We ask the right questions, then build the answer.

The office was founded with a clear conviction — that quality architecture is not a luxury reserved for large cities or large budgets. Qassim deserves better buildings, and we intend to build them.
about.mission: Every project is an opportunity to make something that outlasts the brief. We hold ourselves to that standard on every commission.

careers.title: Careers
careers.heading: We're Growing
careers.body: We're always looking for talented people who are passionate about architecture. If you'd like to join the team, get in touch.
